positive: A stylized and intricate mandala design featuring celestial fauna, such as stylized crescent moons, soaring origami ravens, and minimalist lunar deer, intertwined with flowing cosmic vines and geometric mandalas. The scene must have a strong, graphic silhouette, utilizing a limited color palette of deep indigo, ethereal turquoise, and crisp gold foil accents. Composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed specifically for high-contrast apparel printing. Style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and mystical folklore illustration, ensuring clean lines and scalability. Highly detailed, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, photorealism, gradient wash, realistic, logos, signatures
